Appearances:
Plaintiff Hiu C Chow is present. Represented by
Attorney Steven Williams appearing for plaintiff.
Defendant Michael McCant and Jerri Hughes are present.
Attorney Frank Scaduto representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Karen Kwong, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Nov- 13-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
